agents.name: Pipeline Designer
agents.purpose: Design or troubleshoot CI/CD pipeline configurations
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the project structure and requirements. Design a CI/CD pipeline with: build, test, lint, security scan, and deploy stages. Handle environment-specific configs and secrets management.

agents.name: Config Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write the CI/CD configuration (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins). Include: trigger conditions, caching, parallel jobs, environment variables, artifact management, deployment steps, and rollback mechanism. Add comments explaining each section.

suggestion_card.title: CI/CD Helper
suggestion_card.subtitle: Design CI/CD pipelines
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a CI/CD pipeline for [project type]
